verdict.answer_first: A and B both answer in sentence 1; A is sharper: "Default to a monorepo" while B adds "my default recommendation".
verdict.decisiveness: A commits harder to one call: "What I'd actually do: one repo"; B is decisive too but softens with "it genuinely depends".
verdict.fabrication: B slightly overstates with "almost never hit"; A's "thousands of devs, giant histories" is also an unsupported scale anchor. Neither fabricates user facts.
verdict.actionability: A is easier to act on because it gives a concrete setup now: "three top-level service directories plus a shared package, per-service deploy pipelines".
